findings.finding: Structural reroutes (هدي already-present, أتي/رأي unflattened) still mis-routed
findings.remaining_action: owner-gated live reindex for index-miss families
findings.verification_method: lane-sanity PASS; casebook bucket1='structural reroute — no authoring' (هدي example) routed to reindex

findings.finding: Unsafe families must be frozen as rejection fixtures
findings.verification_method: check_regressions scar-family fixtures (>=16: verb-clitic+voice+banned كذبوا/ويقتلون/فاستقيموا/جاءني) all REJECT

findings.finding: True missing-entry families need owner-gated proposals

head: d67f873
summary: The backlog is fully differentiated: `review-only-casebook.jsonl` holds **1,606 families across 9 buckets**, each row carrying bucket / family_key / root_cause / gate / generator / validator / next_command / contributes_to_90 — i.e. an open-stem-casebook-v2 already. Structural reroutes (هدي already-present → reindex; أتي/رأي flattened), function-word lanes, owner-gated missing entries (52), and frozen scar fixtures (كذبوا/ويقتلون/فاستقيموا/جاءني, all REJECT in the gate) are each routed to the correct lane with the correct gate.
